MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

CROSS-DEFENDANT ROMULEA DESIGNS, INC.'S Motion To Vacate Default Taken Against Cross-Defendant Romulea Design, Inc.

Cross-complainant Michael Imperiale's motion to vacate default judgment taken against cross-defendant Romulea Design, Inc., entered on June 29, 2021, is GRANTED. Imperiale has shown that Romulea was not served with both a summons and the cross-complaint. The motion is unopposed.

Order submitted.
